name: Indian Pot Roast (Ai)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Rum or Dry Red Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the garlic and sauté in the butter.
2. Rub the meat with salt and flour, then brown it well on all sides in the butter.
3. Place the meat on a bed of thin-sliced onion in a large Dutch oven or any pot with a tight-fitting lid.
4. Add the butter, spices, and seasonings to the pot.
5. Pour the rum or wine over the meat. A good pot roast will supply most of its own juices, but add 1/2 cup water to ensure an ample gravy supply.
6. Cover tightly and simmer for 3 to 4 hours until the roast is tender. This can be done in the oven or on the back of the stove.
7. If desired, add carrots for the last half hour of cooking and dumplings for the last 12 minutes of cooking.
8. Remove the roast to a hot, round platter and surround with dumplings and carrots.
9. Stir the gravy until smooth and correct seasoning if necessary. Pour it over the roast. If fresh dill is available, garnish generously.
10. Serves 6-8
DUMPLINGS
Sift together the dry ingredients and add milk gradually. Drop by spoonful into the gravy and cook with pot toast or stew during the last 12 minutes of cooking.
